content:
DEAL NOTE
Customer: Summit Tech Partners
Customer ID: C008
Contract ID: K006
Account Executive: James Okafor
Deal Type: New Business
Date: May 1, 2023

DEAL SUMMARY
Closed Summit Tech Partners on InsightIQ Enterprise at 25 users, $36,000 ARR. No discount. Fastest enterprise close of the year at 18 days from first demo to signature.

DISCOVERY NOTES
Champion is CTO Alex Nguyen. Summit Tech provides managed IT services and needed an analytics platform to generate performance reports for their enterprise clients. InsightIQ's white-labeling capability and multi-tenant dashboard support were unique requirements that competitors could not meet.

CLOSING NOTES
Alex Nguyen ran a streamlined evaluation with clear criteria. InsightIQ was the only platform that met all three of his non-negotiable requirements: white-label branding, multi-tenant data isolation, and API access for automated report delivery. No significant objections. Legal review was completed internally.

EXPANSION POTENTIAL
Summit Tech is actively growing its managed services client base. As they add new enterprise clients, they will need to add user licenses. The account has strong organic expansion potential — flag for quarterly check-ins.
